# llms.txt for maatiai.org
# Defines how AI crawlers may access and use site content.

# --- Site Metadata ---
site: https://maatiai.org
owner: Ma'at Institute of Artificial Intelligence
contact: https://maatiai.org/contact
policy: allow

# --- Allowed Pages ---
allow: /
allow: /capabilities
allow: /the-stewards
allow: /contact

# --- Disallowed Content ---
# (Add paths here if you later want to block AI training on specific pages)
disallow: /private
disallow: /admin

# --- Crawl Behavior ---
rate_limit: 5r/m
cache: allow
index: allow
train: allow
derive: allow

# --- Priority Hints ---
priority: / = high
priority: /capabilities = medium
priority: /the-stewards = medium
priority: /contact = medium

# --- Additional Notes ---
# This file is designed for LLM crawlers such as:
# OpenAI GPTBot, Anthropic ClaudeBot, Google Gemini, Perplexity, etc.
# It complements robots.txt but is AI‑specific.
